name: feedback_and_adaptive_learning
purpose: Persist feedback, learned keywords, and intent adjustments so the helper can improve future feature detection and prompt selection across repeated use.

related_ext_files.role: Stores feedback summaries, learned keywords, and rolling prompt acceptance data.
Uses learned intent weights to refine future planning-style detection.
Uses learned feature weights to improve feature ranking.
Provides the base intent configuration that learning builds on top of.

notes: Learning data can live in the target project when that project has an ai/system directory, otherwise the helper falls back to its own shared system folder.
This feature improves routing quality without changing the underlying business features directly.
